title: भैरव सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री भैरव सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम् ॥

ॐ भैरवो भूतनाथश्च भीषणो भयनाशनः।
कालभैरवो दण्डपाणिर्महाकालो दिगम्बरः॥ १॥

रुद्ररूपो महारुद्रः कपालमालाविभूषणः।
शूलहस्तो डमरुधारी भस्मभूषितविग्रहः॥ २॥

श्वानवाहनसंस्थानः काशीपुरनिवासकः।
कोटिसूर्यसमप्रभो अष्टभैरवनायकः॥ ३॥

रुरुभैरवो चण्डभैरवो असिताङ्गभैरवो हरः।
उन्मत्तभैरवो रक्तो कपालभैरवो ऽपरः॥ ४॥

क्रोधभैरवो संहारी बिडालभैरवो महान्।
चामुण्डाप्रियो घोरो ज्वालामालापरिष्कृतः॥ ५॥

कालरात्रिसमारूढो मृत्युञ्जयसमन्वितः।
नागहारो नागभूषो नागेन्द्रकुण्डलान्वितः॥ ६॥

त्रिशूलधारी खड्गहस्तो पाशान्कुशधरो विभुः।
योगिनीगणसंसेव्यो डाकिनीमण्डलाधिपः॥ ७॥

क्षेत्रपालो ग्रामरक्षो नगररक्षाकरो बली।
सर्वभूतग्रहहरः सर्वव्याधिविनाशकः॥ ८॥

कालदण्डधरो नित्यो यमदण्डनिवारकः।
सर्वपापविनाशाय सर्वारिष्टनिवारकः॥ ९॥

शिवांशो शङ्करप्रियो महादेवस्वरूपकः।
भक्तरक्षाकरो देवो भैरवाय नमो नमः॥ १०॥

॥ इति श्री भैरव सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम् (मुख्य अंश) सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Bhairava Sahasranama Stotram ||

Om Bhairavo Bhutanathash Cha Bhishano Bhayanashanah |
Kalabhairavo Dandapanir Mahakalo Digambarah || 1 ||

Rudrarupo Maharudrah Kapalamalavibbhushanah |
Shuulahasto Damarudhari Bhasmabhushitavigrahah || 2 ||

Shvanavahana Samsthanah Kashipuranivasakah |
Kotisuryasamaprabho Ashtabhairvanayakah || 3 ||

Rurubhairavo Chandabhairavo Asitangabhairavo Harah |
Unmattabhairavo Rakto Kapalabhairavo Aparah || 4 ||

Krodhabhairavo Samhari Bidalabhairavo Mahan |
Chamundapriyo Ghoro Jvalamalaparishkritah || 5 ||

Kalaratrisamarudho Mrityunjayasamanvitah |
Nagaharo Nagabhusho Nagendrakundalanvitah || 6 ||

Trishuladhari Khadgahasto Pashankushadharo Vibhuh |
Yoginiganasamseevyo Dakinimandalaadhipah || 7 ||

Kshetrapalo Gramarakso Nagarakshakaro Bali |
Sarvabhutagrahaharah Sarvavyadhivinashakah || 8 ||

Kaladandadharo Nityo Yamadandanivarakah |
Sarvapapavinashaya Sarvarishtanivarakah || 9 ||

Shivamsho Shankarapriyo Mahadevasvarupakah |
Bhaktarakshakaro Devo Bhairavaya Namo Namah || 10 ||

|| Iti Shri Bhairava Sahasranama Stotram (Mukhya Amsha) Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning:
भैरव, भूतनाथ, भीषण, भयनाशन, कालभैरव, दण्डपाणि, महाकाल, दिगम्बर — इन नामों से भैरव का स्मरण।

रुद्ररूप, कपालमाला, शूलहस्त, डमरुधारी, भस्मभूषित।

श्वानवाहन, काशीपुर निवासी, अष्टभैरव नायक।

कालदण्डधारी, यमदण्ड निवारक, सर्वपाप विनाशक, सर्वारिष्ट निवारक।

शिव का अंश, भक्तरक्षक श्री भैरव को नमस्कार।
benefits: Thousand names of Lord Bhairava the fierce form of Shiva
Supreme protection from all evil spirits and negative forces
Classical tradition invokes this for removal of planetary afflictions and yama's punishments
Invokes all eight forms of Bhairava simultaneously
Essential for Kala Bhairava Ashtami and Saturday worship
description: Among the most cherished prayers to Lord Bhairava, Bhairava Sahasranama Stotram (भैरव सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम्) stands as a sacred recitation of 1000 divine names. Drawn from Rudra Yamala Tantra, this text has been cherished by devotees for centuries. Devotees recite this prayer to thousand names of Lord Bhairava the fierce form of Shiva and remove all planetary afflictions and Yama's punishments. It is also said to invoke all eight forms of Bhairava simultaneously. It is especially recommended on Saturday (Shanivar) and Tuesday (Mangalvar) and during Kala Bhairava Ashtami for maximum spiritual benefit. At 10 verses long, the recitation takes roughly 7 minutes, making it accessible for regular devotional use. On this page, you can read the complete Bhairava Sahasranama Stotram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Bhairava Sahasranama in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Thousand names of Lord Bhairava for supreme protection and fear removal.
